error_signature: request.body should NOT have additional properties
title: Invalid properties in request body for workflow update
symptom: When attempting to update a workflow via the n8n API, an HTTP 400 error occurs with the message 'request.body should NOT have additional properties'.
applies_when: Updating a workflow using n8n API
Using a JSON body that includes unsupported properties
not_this_if: The request body does not contain additional properties
root_cause: The error occurs because the request body contains properties that are not recognized by the n8n API for the workflow update operation. Specifically, the presence of the 'pinData' key is causing the validation to fail.
fix_steps: Remove the 'pinData' key from the JSON body used for the workflow update
Ensure that only the allowed properties are included in the request body
Retry the workflow update via the n8n API
agent_instruction: Remove the 'pinData' key from your JSON request body before updating the workflow.
